summary: Iteration 7: Agency Admin Creation Feature Testing - All features working correctly. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components rendering correctly after fix. When super admin creates agency, admin credentials (name, email, password) are shown in success modal.

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: React Native Web fragment (<>...</>) was not rendering admin credential fields in the New Agency modal
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Changed from React fragment to View component with explicit styling, changed condition from `!editAgency` to `editAgency === null`, and adjusted ScrollView styling

seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_Agency_xxx and TEST_E2E_Agency_xxx entries created from backend and e2e tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Agency admin creation feature fully operational. Super admin can create agencies with admin credentials via modal. Admin credentials (name, email, password) are displayed in success modal after creation. New admin can immediately login via /admin-login page.

backend_agency_creation_with_admin.details: POST /api/agencies creates agency + admin user with role='admin', returns admin_email and admin_name

backend_duplicate_email_check.details: POST /api/agencies returns 400 if admin_email already exists

backend_newly_created_admin_login.details: Admin created via agency creation can immediately login with POST /api/admin/login

backend_agency_scoped_data.details: Agency admin only sees own agency data for stats, reservations, users

frontend_admin_login_page.details: /admin-login renders with dark theme, 'Se connecter' button, 'Nouvelle agence ?' toggle link

frontend_admin_panel_badges.details: Admin panel shows agency name badge (yellow), role badge (Super Admin/Admin), 'Agences' tab for super admin

frontend_new_agency_modal.details: Modal shows agency info fields + admin credentials section (name, email, password), button 'Creer l'agence + admin'

frontend_success_modal_credentials.details: After agency creation, success modal displays admin credentials (name, email, password) for communication
